creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
Hi,

would it  be possible to add this site to MASTER_SITE_XORG?

http://xorg.freedesktop.org/releases/%SUBDIR%/ \

Because, the port cannot fetch the recent files from the site currently in bsd.sites.mk (and I've got a host  behind a silly firewall that only does HTTP)

Fix: 

add the above line to bsd.sites.mk
How-To-Repeat: install xorg or xorg-libraries
